meta.note: Canonical product roadmap remains docs/product_roadmap_2026.json. thesynlab_pitch_deck.pptx was not present in the repo; this plan merges that intent with roadmap phase2_growth + passive revenue channels.

pillars: Dual Trust + Integration scores with methodology transparency (vs single-score review sites)
Protocol and ecosystem depth: matrix + deep-dive explainers + lab freshness
Tools moat: hub builder, compatibility leaderboard, AI finder, compare up to 5 products
Consent-first ads and disclosed affiliate links (publisher trust + program compliance)

passiveIncomeChannels.description: Amazon Associates and SaaS/hardware partner links on high-intent pages.
implementation: Optional per-product affiliate URLs in admin when you expand beyond Amazon

passiveIncomeChannels.description: Google AdSense in reserved slots after advertising cookie consent.
implementation: Optional Convex adSlotConfigs for enable/disable; or VITE_ADSENSE_FALLBACK_WITHOUT_DB=1 for env-only

passiveIncomeChannels.description: Schema already supports isSponsored; use for labeled placements without affecting score integrity.
implementation: Admin product form + disclosure copy on page

passiveIncomeChannels.description: Newsletter component on homepage; sell slots in ESP once list scales.
implementation: Operational: sponsor line in campaigns; no code blockers

passiveIncomeChannels.description: Future: public API and memberships (roadmap phase3).
implementation: NEW-003 developer portal when traffic justifies build

stepByStepExecution.title: Revenue plumbing
tasks: Create AdSense ad units; set VITE_ADSENSE_CLIENT and slot env vars; enable VITE_ADSENSE_FALLBACK_WITHOUT_DB=1 or seed adSlotConfigs active

stepByStepExecution.title: Growth surface area (phase2)
tasks: Protocol deep-dive cards + matrix on product specs (shipped)
Next: video embeds NEW-004, community compatibility reports COMPAT-006

stepByStepExecution.title: Scale and defensibility (phase3)
tasks: Brand portal NEW-002, public API NEW-003
Programmatic SEO protocol and pair pages
Automated crons: stale scores, broken affiliate links
